programme.title: Murder at the Merriweather
programme.desc: Sophie searches for the truth when her best friend falls to her death at a luxury resort. But in this world of haves and have-nots, everyone hides a secret.

programme.title: Kidnapping My Own Daughter
programme.desc: A devoted CPS worker and her family are taken hostage by two desperate parents who are searching for their wrongfully removed child.

programme.title: Murder at the Merriweather
programme.desc: Sophie searches for the truth when her best friend falls to her death at a luxury resort. But in this world of haves and have-nots, everyone hides a secret.

programme.title: Kidnapping My Own Daughter
programme.desc: A devoted CPS worker and her family are taken hostage by two desperate parents who are searching for their wrongfully removed child.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; based on the belief that the Bible is the written and inspired Word of God, the show is meant to invoke change in the lives of people across the globe; Creflo and his wife, Taffi, share their vision for everyone to hear the Word and gain understanding of God's love and promises.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: James Robison is a former preacher who changed directions in his life several years ago and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people. This daily religious and self-help program welcomes guests who tell how they have successfully overcome difficulties in their lives by following God's word -- with the hope of encouraging others to do the same and look to God for help and guidance in times of need. The Robisons provide viewers with Bible-based advice to help them deal with everyday problems.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Noted for her humanitarian ministry efforts to aid suffering people around the world, Bible teacher Joyce Meyer reaches out to both Christians and non-Christians as she illustrates how to make each day better by applying biblical principles to every activity.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Robyn McCall, an enigmatic former CIA operative, must use her extensive skills to help a teenager accused of murder and on the run from the criminals who framed her for the crime.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: A mother's son is kidnapped by a human trafficker and will be executed unless McCall steals confidential information from her FBI agent employer; McCall enlists Aunt Vi to help uncover a secret Delilah is keeping from them both.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: McCall tries to help an escaped prisoner who is wrongly accused of murder; McCall worries when her daughter, Delilah, stops hanging out with a close friend; Dante's search for McCall takes an unexpected turn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan and Juarez are on the hunt for a fugitive after a car incident goes awry; a past injury comes to haunt Tim and Lucy comes through during his time in need in more ways than one.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan and Celina investigate a cash deposit linked to an old DEA case; Wesley grows increasingly concerned about his deposition and is shocked when he realizes Elijah's attorney is a familiar face from his past.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer John Nolan and Celina witness a shooting and realize the victim is already dead; Bailey has been feeling off-center since the proposal, leaving Nolan to wonder what he can do to make her feel better.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Stephanie has dreams of being a caterer, but is humiliated by her giant baseball-sized scalp bump; Deb is afraid that the growth on the side of her knee may eventually paralyze her.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dr. Lee asks Dr. Zoe to help double-team needle-shy Mary Ann's crusty skin; Isaiah's mom is concerned he is ignoring the growing lump over his lower spine; Maressa worries about the dangers of treating the oozing skin covering her ankles and body.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jason has become a recluse because of a giant growth on the back of his neck; Marisa hates the red spider veins on her face; Kobe hums to stay calm as student Gili helps Dr. Lee remove a huge bump near his eye.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Tobi is having trouble re-entering the dating pool because of symmetrical bumps around her spine.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Bryan has a genetic condition that may be causing huge mystery bumps; Chalamar cannot dress how she wants because of her ugly chest bump; Dr. Lee enlists Dr. Lyndsey's surgical assistance to help sexy grandma Devi get her bikini body back.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jack searches for the confidence to try surgery on his throat bump, after fainting during a previous attempt. Kristan is a young, bubbly gym teacher who has given up on love after discovering a growth on her back. Dr. Tomassian helps Dr. Lee reconstruct Victoria's earlobes so she can feel confident enough to regain her pro skateboarding career.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: The stress of dealing with dermatological issues can go beyond skin deep. This episode revisits four memorable cases where Dr. Sandra Lee aims to improve the mental health and quality of life of her patients and provide them with a new lease on life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: The journey to addressing certain skin ailments is one to be tread lightly, especially for those overcome with anxiety. This special explores four patients who had to confront their fears surrounding treatment.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Angela has a big, melon-sized growth on the back of her neck that she fears can ruin her daughter's wedding; Loretta is terrified that her painful can get in the way of making her movie.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jon's huge, 25-year-old shoulder blade bump is ruining his family beach days and risking his health. April wants the wedding of her dreams but feels hideous in gowns due to her bumpy underarm "growth". Dr. Zoe gets a front row seat to new father Rondel's frightening looking forearm bump.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jimmy is a Charleston firefighter whose myriad of torso bumps make it painful to play with his young son.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: The stress of dealing with dermatological issues can go beyond skin deep. This episode revisits four memorable cases where Dr. Sandra Lee aims to improve the mental health and quality of life of her patients and provide them with a new lease on life.

programme.desc: The journey to addressing certain skin ailments is one to be tread lightly, especially for those overcome with anxiety. This special explores four patients who had to confront their fears surrounding treatment.

programme.desc: Angela has a big, melon-sized growth on the back of her neck that she fears can ruin her daughter's wedding; Loretta is terrified that her painful can get in the way of making her movie.

programme.desc: Jimmy is a Charleston firefighter whose myriad of torso bumps make it painful to play with his young son.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: McCall investigates a community activist's staged suicide and uncovers a connection between his murder and his protests over local real estate development; Delilah's driving lessons lead McCall and Aunt Vi to teach her an even bigger lesson.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: When McCall tries to locate a missing British mathematician, she finds herself embroiled in an international fight for a revolutionary financial technology.

programme.desc: McCall tries to help a despondent college student being threatened by someone working for a rising politician; McCall worries when Delilah starts hanging out with a young girl who served time in juvenile detention.
